title: [MTR3] British Rail Classes 507 & 508
description: Resource pack that adds BR Classes 507 & 508 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **British Rail Class 507/508** are Third-rail EMUs produced by **British Rail Engineering Limited** between 1978 and 1980. They are a member of BREL's 1972 design suburban trains, the others being Class 313, 314 and 315. Class 507 is "designed for Merseyside" after proven to be "suitable" to be used (initially on the Northern Line) after a test carried out by 2 Class 313 units. Class 508 however is originally used in London (they are also designed for Merseyside), then are all transferred to Merseyrail and reclassified to Class 508/1 and have 1 of their TSO coach removed and used on Class 455/7s instead. Some are leased to Southeastern and London Overground in the 2000s, which are later scrapped without returning to Merseyrail. Class 507 initially worked on the Northern Line and Class 508 on the Wirral Line, but they now work on both lines anyway.

This resource pack is to add the Classes 507 and 508 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 from September 2022.

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Merseyrail Electrics 2002 Limited.
